headline: Will APTIV PLC (APTV) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
summary: APTIV PLC (APTV) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

headline: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on Aptiv, Raises Price Target to $90
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Tom Narayan   maintains Aptiv (NYSE:APTV) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $81 to $90.
